headline: Smurfit Westrock plc Results of Annual General Meeting of Shareholders and Filing of Form 8-K Reporting the Same
summary: DUBLIN, May 01, 2026-- Smurfit Westrock plc (the "Company") today filed a Form 8-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC") which notes that the Company held its 2026 annual general meeting of shareholders (the "Annual General Meeting") earlier today, May 1, 2026 and that all directors put forward for election at the Annual General Meeting were elected by the shareholders and all other resolutions recommended by the Company's Board of Directors were passed at the Annual Gener
